com.hp.workpath.api.job

Class PrintJobData

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.job.PrintJobData
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.os.Parcelable, com.hp.workpath.api.Convertor, JobInfo.JobData

    public class PrintJobData
extends java.lang.Object
implements JobInfo.JobData, com.hp.workpath.api.Convertor

    Provides details of PRINT job.

    Since:
    API 1

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getCopies()
      Returns Number of copies of the job
      PrintAttributes.Duplex getDuplex()
      Returns duplex mode of print job
      int getImpressionsPrinted()
      Returns total number of impressions (one side)
      PrintJobState getJobState()
      Returns the state of print job.
      int getSheetsPrinted()
      Returns total number of sheets (one or two sides)
      PrintAttributes.Source getSource()
      Returns source of the file for print

    • Method Detail

      • getSheetsPrinted

        public int getSheetsPrinted()
        Returns total number of sheets (one or two sides)
        Returns:
        number of sheets
        Since:
        API 1

      • getImpressionsPrinted

        public int getImpressionsPrinted()
        Returns total number of impressions (one side)
        Returns:
        number of impressions
        Since:
        API 1

      • getCopies

        public int getCopies()
        Returns Number of copies of the job
        Returns:
        number of copies
        Since:
        API 1

      • getDuplex

        public PrintAttributes.Duplex getDuplex()
        Returns duplex mode of print job
        Returns:
        Duplex duplex mode
        Since:
        API 1

      • getJobState

        public PrintJobState getJobState()
        Returns the state of print job. If job is printing, "PROCESSING" returns.
        Returns:
        PrintJobState the state of print job
        Since:
        API 1

      • getSource

        public PrintAttributes.Source getSource()
        Returns source of the file for print
        Returns:
        PrintAttributes.Source source of the file
        Since:
        API 1
